name: Metastatic Bladder Urothelial Carcinoma (IMvigor210 Phase II Trial, ESMO Open. 2024) - iAtlas Harmonized
description: Whole-exome sequencing and neoantigen landscape analysis of 347 metastatic bladder urothelial carcinomas and their matched normals, generated from a phase II trial of atezolizumab monotherapy in cisplatin-ineligible and platinum-pretreated patients. The reprocessing of raw sequencing data is coordinated by CRI iAtlas.
